gamification.freezeDescription: You earn a freeze every 7-day streak milestone. Use one to cover a day you forgot to log, so your streak keeps going instead of resetting to zero.
gamification.achStreak7Description: Log steps 7 days in a row
gamification.achStreak7DetailUnlocked: You've logged steps for {{streak}} days in a row. Nice consistency!
gamification.achStreak7DetailLocked: {{streak}}/7 days logged in a row. Log your steps again tomorrow to keep the streak alive.
gamification.achStreak30Description: Log steps 30 days in a row
gamification.achStreak30DetailUnlocked: You've logged steps for {{streak}} days straight — a full month of consistency!
gamification.achStreak30DetailLocked: {{streak}}/30 days logged in a row. Keep your daily step log going to reach 30.
gamification.achStreakRecordDescription: Match or beat your longest-ever streak
gamification.achStreakRecordDetailUnlocked: Your current streak of {{streak}} days matches or beats your all-time best!
gamification.achStreakRecordDetailLocked: Your current streak is {{streak}} days. Your all-time best is {{best}} days — beat it to unlock.
gamification.achStepGoalDetailUnlocked: You've hit today's step goal. Great work!
gamification.achStepGoalDetailLocked: You haven't hit today's step goal yet. Log more steps today to unlock this.
gamification.achSleepGoalDetailUnlocked: You hit last night's sleep goal. Well rested!
gamification.achSleepGoalDetailLocked: You didn't hit last night's sleep goal. Log a full night's sleep to unlock this.
gamification.achWeeklyWorkoutsDetailUnlocked: You've completed {{sessions}}/{{goal}} workouts this week. Goal met!
gamification.achWeeklyWorkoutsDetailLocked: {{sessions}}/{{goal}} workouts logged this week. Log {{remaining}} more to unlock this.
gamification.achPrWatchDescription: Within range of a new all-time PR
gamification.achPrWatchDetailUnlocked: You're close to a new PR on {{exercise}}. Push for it in your next session!
gamification.achPrWatchDetailLocked: No exercise is close to a new PR right now. Keep training to get within range.
gamification.achNoSleepDebtDetailUnlocked: No sleep debt this week. Your recovery is on track.
gamification.achNoSleepDebtDetailLocked: You have sleep debt built up this week. Log more rest to catch up and unlock this.
gamification.challengeStepsDescription: Hit your step goal 5 days this week
gamification.challengeRestDescription: End the week with no sleep debt
